    PyPNM / SingleCapture / OFDM / GetCapture-FecSummary

    Source Files

    • HTML/script: visual/PyPNM/SingleCapture/OFDM/GetCapture-FecSummary.html
    • JSON sample: visual/PyPNM/SingleCapture/OFDM/GetCapture-FecSummary.json

    Preview

    Preview is best-effort. Some templates may rely on Postman-specific APIs that are not yet shimmed.

    Visualizer HTML/script source 
    // Visualization Script
const template = `
<div style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; padding: 20px;">
    <h2 style="text-align: center; color: #333;">FEC Summary - Codeword Analysis</h2>

    {{#each channels}}
    <div style="margin-bottom: 40px; border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px;">
        <h3 style="color: #2c5aa0;">Channel ID: {{channel_id}}</h3>

        {{#each profiles}}
        <div style="margin-bottom: 30px;">
            <h4 style="color: #555;">Profile {{profile}}</h4>
            <canvas id="chart-{{../channel_id}}-{{profile}}" height="80"></canvas>
        </div>
        {{/each}}
    </div>
    {{/each}}
</div>

<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/2.5.0/Chart.min.js"></script>
<script>
    pm.getData(function (err, value) {
        value.channels.forEach(function(channel) {
            channel.profiles.forEach(function(profile) {
                var ctx = document.getElementById("chart-" + channel.channel_id + "-" + profile.profile);
                new Chart(ctx, {
                    type: "line",
                    data: {
                        labels: profile.timestampLabels,
                        datasets: [
                            {
                                label: "Total Codewords",
                                data: profile.total_codewords,
                                borderColor: "#2c5aa0",
                                backgroundColor: "rgba(44, 90, 160, 0.1)",
                                fill: true,
                                borderWidth: 2,
                                pointRadius: 0,
                                pointHoverRadius: 0,
                                yAxisID: "y-axis-1"
                            },
                            {
                                label: "Corrected",
                                data: profile.corrected,
                                borderColor: "#f39c12",
                                backgroundColor: "rgba(243, 156, 18, 0.1)",
                                fill: true,
                                borderWidth: 2,
                                pointRadius: 0,
                                pointHoverRadius: 0,
                                yAxisID: "y-axis-2"
                            },
                            {
                                label: "Uncorrected",
                                data: profile.uncorrected,
                                borderColor: "#e74c3c",
                                backgroundColor: "rgba(231, 76, 60, 0.1)",
                                fill: true,
                                borderWidth: 2,
                                pointRadius: 0,
                                pointHoverRadius: 0,
                                yAxisID: "y-axis-2"
                            }
                        ]
                    },
                    options: {
                        responsive: true,
                        maintainAspectRatio: true,
                        scales: {
                            yAxes: [
                                {
                                    id: "y-axis-1",
                                    type: "linear",
                                    position: "left",
                                    scaleLabel: {
                                        display: true,
                                        labelString: "Total Codewords"
                                    }
                                },
                                {
                                    id: "y-axis-2",
                                    type: "linear",
                                    position: "right",
                                    scaleLabel: {
                                        display: true,
                                        labelString: "Errors"
                                    },
                                    gridLines: {
                                        drawOnChartArea: false
                                    }
                                }
                            ],
                            xAxes: [{
                                scaleLabel: {
                                    display: true,
                                    labelString: "Timestamp"
                                }
                            }]
                        },
                        legend: {
                            display: true,
                            position: "top"
                        }
                    }
                });
            });
        });
    });
</script>
`;

function constructVisualizerPayload() {
    const responseData = pm.response.json();
    const channels = [];

    if (responseData.data && responseData.data.analysis) {
        responseData.data.analysis.forEach(function(channelData) {
            const channelObj = {
                channel_id: channelData.channel_id,
                profiles: []
            };

            channelData.profiles.forEach(function(profileData) {
                const timestampLabels = profileData.codewords.timestamps.map(function(ts) {
                    return new Date(ts * 1000).toLocaleTimeString();
                });

                channelObj.profiles.push({
                    profile: profileData.profile,
                    timestampLabels: timestampLabels,
                    total_codewords: profileData.codewords.total_codewords,
                    corrected: profileData.codewords.corrected,
                    uncorrected: profileData.codewords.uncorrected
                });
            });

            channels.push(channelObj);
        });
    }

    return { channels: channels };
}

pm.visualizer.set(template, constructVisualizerPayload());
